titleStmt.title: SII 38.364: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 364. (A.R. No. 364 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the north wall, first prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Kṛishṇayadeva-Mahārāya Year: Śaka 1454. Virōdhi, Āḍi.

summary.p: This inscription records the assignment of the weaving tax (paṭṭaḍai-nūlāyam) by Kāḷattīśura-Nāyakkar, at the rate of one and half-a-paṇam to be paid per loom (taṟi) per year. The tax so levied was to be deposited in the treasury of the Tirumalaruḍaiyanāyiṉār temple at Dēvikkāpuram in Murugamaṅgalappaṟṟu in Mēlkuṉṟa-nāḍu in Mēlkuṉṟa-kōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam.
The temple accountant, Uttaṇḍi, figures as signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śvasvastiśrī maṉ makāmaṇṭalecura metinimicura kaṇṭakaṭṭāri cāḷuva śrīvirappiṟatāpa kiṣṇa tevamakāirāyar piṟitiviirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷaā niṉṟa cakāṟtam 1000 4 100 5 10 4 mel cellā niṉṟa ceyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu
melkuṉṟakoṭṭattu melkuṉṟanaāṭṭu murukamaṅkalappaṟṟu tevastāṉam tevikkāpuram tirumalaruṭaiyanāyiṉār śrī paṇṭārattukku kāḷattiyicuranāyakkar Ayyaṉ taṉmam Itu viroti varuṣam Āṭi
taṟikku Ellām taṟi Oṉṟukku varuṣam 1 kku paṭṭaṭai nūlāyattukku Oṉṟaraippaṇam viḻukkāṭu koyilpaṇṭārattukku yiṟukkum cukattileyirukka kaṭaivārākavum yintataṉmattukku yātoruvar Akutam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ kaṅkaikkaraiyile kārāmpacu
vai koṉṟa toṣattile poka kaṭaivar Ākavum Inta kalveṭṭu Eḻutinamaikku koyilkaṇakku Uttaṇṭi Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 38.364 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
